payload.title: The Ultimate Persona: Builder Who Hires Builders
payload.body: I defined the actual person this site is built to reach. A VP Product or Director of PM at Apple, Anthropic, Adobe, OpenAI, Google, Airbnb, Uber, Microsoft, or Netflix. Someone who evaluates based on judgment, not pedigree. They scan for 30-60 seconds, look for evidence of thinking, and either reach out or move on. This reframes every decision: Does this matter to a VP Product scanning for 60 seconds?
payload.decision: The primary GTM target is a senior product leader at a target company who evaluates on thinking, not credentials.
payload.alternatives_considered: Targeting recruiters, targeting broadly, targeting just through warm network.
payload.open_questions: Is the 60-second scan the right visit pattern to optimize for?
